data.title: Oil Tumbles, Nasdaq 100 Jumps 3% As Iran Says It's Ready To Halt Hostilities: 10 Stocks Moving
data.description: WTI crude oil fell by 2% to $100 per barrel following Iran's President Masoud Pezeshkian's announcement that the Islamic Republic is willing to end the war, contingent on guarantees from the United States. This optimistic statement resulted in a surge in equities during early afternoon trading on Tuesday. The Nasdaq 100, tracked by the Invesco QQQ Trust (NASDAQ: QQQ), saw a remarkable 3.2% increase, marking its most substantial rally since May 2025. Additionally, the S&P 500 continued its upward trend with a 2.6% gain, while the Russell 2000 climbed by 2.9%. The CBOE Volatility Index (VIX) also experienced a significant drop of 14.4% to 26.20, eliminating a substantial portion of its March premium as investors began shedding hedges built up during weeks of uncertainty in the Middle East. The markets saw a strong surge in airlines, clean energy, and growth stocks as a result of the ceasefire signal, prompting an aggressive rotation during the trading session.

data.title: FDA Warns Of Fatal Liver Risks Linked To Amgen Tavneos Use
data.description: The FDA has issued a warning regarding severe and sometimes deadly liver injuries associated with Amgen Inc.'s drug Tavneos (avacopan). Postmarketing data revealed new safety concerns not previously observed in clinical trials. Tavneos, which received approval in October 2021, is prescribed alongside glucocorticoids and other medications for the treatment of severe active ANCA-associated vasculitis in adults. The FDA highlighted the emergence of a new safety signal related to the drug, with reported cases of drug-induced liver injury (DILI), including vanishing bile duct syndrome (VBDS), a rare yet serious condition involving progressive bile duct destruction. This development underscores the importance of closely monitoring patients using Tavneos.

data.title: Fever-Tree Expands Pineapple Ginger Beer and Mojito Mix Availability Nationwide
data.description: A popular premium mixer brand is broadening the availability of its Pineapple Ginger Beer and Classic Mojito Mix across retailers throughout the country. Fever-Tree's Pineapple Ginger Beer and Mojito will soon be more widely accessible, with Pineapple Ginger Beer being distributed to more locations this Spring. This expansion will introduce these tropical-inspired flavors to a larger audience, with the products becoming available across the nation.

data.title: Just 1 in 57 Crypto Owners Globally Pay Taxes on Their Holdings, New Report Finds
data.description: A recent report by Divly, a crypto tax calculator, revealed that just 1.76% of investors worldwide disclose their digital asset holdings to tax authorities. This significant lack of compliance poses risks for millions of investors. Emerging frameworks such as 1099-DA, DAC8, and CARF are enhancing transparency. The data was released in Stockholm on March 31st.

data.title: Paxos introduces Partner Rewards Engine for USDG, offering daily rewards for institutional holders, a first for regulated stablecoins.
data.description: The Partner Rewards Engine has been launched by Paxos, offering daily rewards for institutional holders of USDG. This marks a significant development as it is the first regulated stablecoin to provide on-chain yield that can be claimed on a daily basis.

data.title: Evisions Introduces Argos Data Agent, Bringing Trusted AI to Institutional Data
data.description: Houston - In a recent announcement, Evisions introduced Argos Data Agent, an AI-powered feature in Argos X for higher education institutions. This new capability allows institutions to engage with their data through natural language, ensuring governance, security, and trust are maintained. As AI becomes more integrated into decision-making processes, a common hurdle is the reliability of the analyzed data. Argos Data Agent aims to address this challenge, offering a solution for institutions looking to streamline decision-making processes.

data.title: WeRide Expands Autonomous Driving Milestone In UAE With Uber
data.description: WeRide Inc. (NASDAQ: WRD) has seen a surge in its shares after initiating fully driverless Robotaxi fare-charging services in Dubai, a key milestone in its partnership with Uber Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: UBER). Uber recently disclosed ownership of about 5.82% of WeRide's Class A ordinary shares, indicating strong confidence in the company's technology and long-term value. WeRide stock is rising to new heights due to this news, as the partnership launches Level 4 Robotaxis in Dubai after a successful trial run that began in December 2025. This marks the first batch of fully driverless Robotaxis to enter commercial service in the city, showcasing the advancement in technological capabilities and future prospects for both companies.

data.title: Shake Shack Turnaround: Analyst Says Strategy Can Beef Up Margins
data.description: Shares of Shake Shack, Inc. (NYSE: SHAK) rose following an upgrade by BofA Securities analyst Sara Senatore, who increased the stock rating to Neutral from Underperform and boosted the price target from $88 to $101. Senatore highlighted the company's success in dealing with economic challenges by broadening its supplier base to mitigate the impact of escalating beef prices. These changes are anticipated to enhance profitability and sustain a net restaurant growth rate of around 15% in the medium term. Introducing new menu items such as the Dubai Shake and Korean-inspired dishes has helped stabilize customer traffic amidst a downturn in the industry. By targeting marketing efforts towards younger consumers, Shake Shack has managed to maintain foot traffic levels. Senatore also emphasized the importance of Shake Shack's supply chain strategy, which includes diversifying producers and regions, optimizing products, streamlining transportation logistics, and leveraging technology to offset cost pressures.

data.title: From Market Volatility to Metabolism: Fitness & Finance Radio Covers What Matters Most
data.description: In an episode of Fitness & Finance Radio in Fredericksburg, Virginia on March 31, 2026, it was highlighted how both stock market fluctuations and changes in metabolism are common issues for many individuals. Despite initial perceptions that these two topics may not be related, further exploration reveals significant parallels. Both areas involve constant movements and adjustments - the stock market sees daily changes affecting financial outcomes, while metabolism fluctuations impact physical health. These similarities underscore the importance of understanding and managing both aspects effectively.

data.title: USPS Announces Stamp Issues for World Stamp Show
data.description: Today, the U.S. Postal Service disclosed three new stamp subjects that will debut at the Boston 2026 World Exposition, the 12th international philatelic exhibition in the U.S. The expo will take place from May. This unveiling adds to the anticipation surrounding the event, which is expected to draw a significant turnout of stamp collectors and enthusiasts from around the globe.

data.title: Building North America's Future: Industry Leaders to Unite at GF Flow Symposium
data.description: A forthcoming event, the GF Flow Symposium, is set to take place from May 3-6, 2026, at the renowned Gaylord Opryland Resort & Convention Center in Nashville, Tennessee. The gathering aims to bring together professionals from various sectors including builders, developers, contractors, engineers, and executive leaders.

data.title: Docusign Brings Intelligent Contract Workflows to Slackbot
data.description: Docusign (Nasdaq: DOCU) revealed a recent integration with Slack on March 31, 2026 in San Francisco. This integration allows teams to smoothly transition from discussions to finalizing agreements directly within Slack. The collaboration brings Docusign's Intelligent Agreement Management (IAM) platform to users, streamlining the process.

data.title: Pete Schroedle Appointed as Head of TPA Sales for DWC - The 401(k) Experts
data.description: With over 30 years of experience in retirement sales leadership, a seasoned industry professional has joined DWC to support the firm's nationwide expansion. Based in Philadelphia, the company, known as DWC - The 401(k) Experts, is a prominent third-party administrator specializing in retirement plans and operates as a subsidiary of Fiduciary.

data.title: The TRATON GROUP and Applied Intuition Announce TRATON ONE OS, a Unified Software Platform for Improved Fleet Uptime Across TRATON's Four Global Brands
data.description: In a joint statement released on March 31, 2026, in Munich and Sunnyvale, Calif., the TRATON GROUP and Applied Intuition, Inc. introduced the TRATON ONE OS. This cutting-edge software-defined vehicle platform will be integrated into all upcoming vehicles under TRATON's portfolio of four brands.
